title: anacampta palustris
intro: Anacampta palustris, also known as Marsh Marigold or Kingcup, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Anacampta palustris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin irritations to respiratory problems.
